title: Optimizely Experiment
description: Schema representing an A/B test experiment in Optimizely, including variations, metrics, audience targeting, and traffic allocation configuration.

project_id.description: The project this experiment belongs to

description.description: Description of the experiment purpose and hypothesis

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the experiment

holdback.description: Percentage of traffic held back from the experiment, expressed in basis points (0-10000)

variations.description: List of variations presented to visitors in the experiment

metrics.description: List of metrics used to measure experiment results

audience_conditions.description: JSON-encoded audience targeting conditions that determine which visitors see the experiment

page_ids.description: List of page IDs where the experiment runs

created.description: Timestamp when the experiment was created

last_modified.description: Timestamp when the experiment was last modified

Variation.description: A variation within an experiment that represents a distinct experience shown to visitors

key.description: Unique key for the variation within the experiment

weight.description: Traffic allocation weight in basis points (0-10000)

actions.description: Changes applied when this variation is shown

Action.description: A set of changes applied to a page in a variation

page_id.description: The page this action applies to

changes.description: Individual changes applied on the page

type.description: Type of change (e.g., custom_code, attribute, insert_html)

selector.description: CSS selector targeting the element to modify

Metric.description: A metric definition for measuring experiment outcomes

event_id.description: The event ID this metric tracks

aggregator.description: How to aggregate the metric values

field.description: The field to aggregate on for sum aggregation

scope.description: The scope at which to measure the metric
